title: Easter Bunny Cookie Cutter | 3D Printed PLA | Medium 7-8cm | Spring Baking Tool | Rabbit Fondant Cutter
description:
🐰 Easter Bunny Cookie Cutter – Hop Into Spring Baking!

Bring the magic of Easter to your kitchen with this adorable Easter Bunny cookie cutter! Designed with clean, detailed edges, this charming rabbit-shaped cutter creates perfectly defined cookies every single time. Whether you are preparing a festive Easter brunch, decorating sugar cookies with the kids, or crafting beautiful fondant toppers for a spring celebration cake, this bunny cutter is the perfect addition to your baking toolkit.

This cookie cutter features a delightful bunny silhouette that captures the spirit of the season. The shape is instantly recognizable and guaranteed to bring smiles to faces of all ages. Use it to cut shapes from cookie dough, fondant, modeling clay, craft foam, or even soft cheese and fruit slices for creative snack platters. The possibilities are truly endless when it comes to this versatile little tool.

📐 Dimensions & Details

This listing is for size Medium (M), which measures approximately 7-8cm (2.8-3.1 inches) at the widest point. The cutting edge is approximately 1.5cm deep, providing a clean and consistent cut through standard rolled cookie dough. The cutter is lightweight yet sturdy, with a comfortable grip that makes it easy to press through dough without slipping.

🍪 How to Use

Roll out your cookie dough to an even thickness of about 4-6mm. Lightly dust the cutter with flour or dip it in powdered sugar to prevent sticking. Press the cutter firmly and evenly into the dough, then lift straight up. For fondant work, use a tiny bit of cornstarch instead of flour. Gently push the cut shape out from the cutter if needed using a small spatula or your fingertip. For best results, chill your dough before cutting to ensure crisp, clean edges that hold their shape beautifully during baking.

🧼 Care Instructions

Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven. To clean, simply rinse under lukewarm water and use a soft brush or cloth to remove any dough residue. Allow the cutter to air dry completely before storing. Avoid soaking in hot water, as PLA is a thermoplastic and may warp at high temperatures. With proper care, your cookie cutter will last for many baking seasons to come.

🎁 Perfect Gift Idea

Looking for a thoughtful and unique gift? This Easter Bunny cookie cutter makes a wonderful present for bakers, cookie decorators, and anyone who loves springtime celebrations. It is a fantastic addition to an Easter basket, a sweet stocking stuffer alternative for spring, or a charming party favor for an Easter egg hunt gathering. Pair it with a favorite cookie recipe card and some sprinkles for an unforgettable handmade gift set. It is also a lovely choice for teachers, coworkers, or friends who appreciate creative and practical gifts that inspire joy in the kitchen.

🏠 About Our Shop

Every cookie cutter in our shop is proudly designed and 3D printed in-house with care and attention to detail. We produce our cutters in small batches, and each piece is printed to order to ensure the highest quality and minimal waste. As a small handmade business, we take pride in delivering unique, creative baking tools that you will not find in mass-market stores. Thank you for supporting our small shop, and happy baking!
